economic_notes: Nation owns 8 government business enterprises including Alexis Casino Corporation, Alexis First Nation Business Trust, Alexis Band Oil & Gas Corp., Alexis Nakota Sioux Nation Business Trust, Alexis Group of Companies, Alexis Land Management Corporation, Nakota Crossing Ltd., and Hills Plain Construction LP. Combined GBE revenue was $43,054,466 in 2023. Oil and gas royalties earned through ISC-controlled trust funds. Alexis Settlement Trust holds ~$13.1M in investments from 1995 Treaty Land Entitlement Agreement.
notes: Audit is QUALIFIED due to inability to obtain sufficient audit evidence on investments in and equity in Alexis owned enterprises (GBEs) accounted for by modified equity method - same qualification applied to prior year. Comparative 2022 figures restated due to change in accounting policy adopting PS 3041 for Alexis Settlement Trust portfolio investments (now at fair value vs. cost), adding $2,305,036 to accumulated surplus. Two consolidated subsidiaries: Northern ISGA Foundation and Alexis Board of Education. Eight GBEs accounted for by modified equity method with unaudited financials. Nation guarantees $8.5M in loans for Nakota Crossing Ltd. Remuneration schedule not included in provided financial statement text. Revenue lines include deferred revenue movements making gross vs. net revenue presentation complex.
warnings: Qualified audit opinion issued — financial statements may not fully reflect true position
High ISC dependency (82.57%) — operations heavily reliant on federal transfers
